gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/362)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/362)
text: كَانَ عَلَى خَاتَمِ عَلِيِّ بْنِ الْحُسَيْنِ ( عليه السلام ) خَزِيَ وَ شَقِيَ قَاتِلُ الْحُسَيْنِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ ( عليه السلام ) .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ali Bin Ma’bad, from Al Husayn Bin Khalid,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Al-Hassan<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘It was (inscribed) upon a ring of Ali<sup>asws</sup> Bin Al-Husayn<sup>asws</sup> – ‘خَزِيَ وَ شَقِيَ قَاتِلُ الْحُسَيْنِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ ( عليه السلام )’ “Disgraceful and wretched is the murderer of Al-Husayn<sup>asws</sup> Bin Ali<sup>asws</sup>”’.
en.sarwar: 6. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from Afi ibn Ma’bad from af-Husayn ibn Khafid who has said the following: “Abu al-Hassan, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘On the ring of Ali ibn al-Husayn, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, the writing said, ‘Disgraced and destroyed are murderers of al-Husayn ibn Ah’ ‘Alayhi al-Salam.’”
